prompt:
Prioritise these 5 backlog items using RICE:
1. Bulk export (requested by 3 enterprise customers)
2. SSO integration (blocking 2 enterprise deals worth $120K ARR)
3. Dashboard performance (page load >5s, affecting all users)
4. Mobile app notifications (nice to have, low effort)
5. API rate limiting (technical debt, no customer requests)
assertions: RICE table with Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort, Score, and Rank columns
All scoring assumptions are visible (not just numbers)
Strategic Override Test completed — SSO may be an override candidate given the $120K ARR deal dependency
Data Gap Test identifies low-confidence items and recommends discovery spikes
What Would We Regret test completed
EXPLICITLY NOT BUILDING list is present
Discovery spike recommended for any low-confidence, high-effort item
